case_title: LAN LE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-27-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-24-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-27-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 50 SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED MARCH 19, 2012. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 50
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLTF LAN LE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE OPPOSING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION IN COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE MOVING PAPERS SUPPORT THE SUSTAINING OF THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Dismissal of the entire action was filed March 19, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Leila K. Mongan of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3915) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. The opposing party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the opposition in compliance with Local Rule 2.6B and the moving papers support the sustaining of the demurrer with leave to amend. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
